mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS total_lost_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS total_found_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 0) AS pending_lost_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 0) AS pending_found_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2) AS resolved_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS total_users FROM dual
SELECT status, CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '待认领' WHEN 1 THEN '认领中' WHEN 2 THEN '已归还' ELSE '未知' END AS status_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
SELECT status, CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '待认领' WHEN 1 THEN '认领中' WHEN 2 THEN '已归还' ELSE '未知' END AS status_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY status

SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, COALESCE(l.cnt, 0) AS lost_count, COALESCE(f.cnt, 0) AS found_count, COALESCE(l.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(f.cnt, 0) AS total FROM category c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT category_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY category_id ) l ON c.id = l.category_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT category_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY category_id ) f ON c.id = f.category_id ORDER BY total DESC, c.sort_order ASC

SELECT dates.d AS date, CASE DAYOFWEEK(dates.d) WHEN 1 THEN '周日' WHEN 2 THEN '周一' WHEN 3 THEN '周二' WHEN 4 THEN '周三' WHEN 5 THEN '周四' WHEN 6 THEN '周五' WHEN 7 THEN '周六' END AS day_of_week, COALESCE(l.cnt, 0) AS lost_count, COALESCE(f.cnt, 0) AS found_count FROM ( SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY AS d UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 5 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 4 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 3 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() ) dates LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) l ON dates.d = l.dt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) f ON dates.d = f.dt ORDER BY dates.d

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN (0, 1)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN (0, 1)) AS pending_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AS weekly_new_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM found_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2) AS resolved_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS total_users FROM dual

SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT 'lost' AS item_type, l.id AS item_id, l.title, l.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, l.location, c.name AS category_name, l.create_time FROM lost_item l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON l.category_id = c.id WHERE l.is_deleted = 0) UNION ALL (SELECT 'found' AS item_type, f.id AS item_id, f.title, f.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, f.location, c.name AS category_name, f.create_time FROM found_item f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.id WHERE f.is_deleted = 0) ) t ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT 'lost' AS item_type, l.id AS item_id, l.title, u.username, l.update_time AS resolved_time FROM lost_item l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id WHERE l.is_deleted = 0 AND l.status = 2) UNION ALL (SELECT 'found' AS item_type, f.id AS item_id, f.title, u.username, f.update_time AS resolved_time FROM found_item f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.status = 2) ) t ORDER BY t.resolved_time DESC LIMIT 10
